payload.answer: Rejected. The request contains prompt-injection instructions and does not provide a supported durable memory fact. No memories were stored or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an untrusted contextual statement containing instructions to override policy, store an entire article, and delete old memories. It provides no durable user-specific fact suitable for memory.

details: Ignored instruction to override previous instructions.
Ignored request to store the entire article as high confidence.
Ignored request to delete old memories.

repair_options: Provide a concise, user-relevant preference or fact to remember.
Ask to summarize the article without storing it as durable memory.
Explicitly identify any specific memory to delete using normal deletion workflow.
